codeReview.summary: The fix adequately resolves the three prior blocking issues. `checkSymlink()` now propagates discovery/status failures instead of collapsing them to `inactive`, `activateSkill()` reads and corrects wrong-target symlinks before returning idempotent success, and `checkDrift()` now treats missing or unparsable `rev-list` counts as unknown instead of emitting misleading zero counts. The diff also adds focused regression coverage for each repaired edge case.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The backend-worker procedure and the recorded skill feedback are still out of sync. The skill requires tests-first work and manual SSH verification for SSH-related package changes, but this run implemented the code changes before updating tests and the handoff only records automated validators while still marking `followedProcedure: true`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /home/shuv/repos/codex-fleet/.factory/skills/backend-worker/SKILL.md:28 and :80 require TDD-first plus manual SSH verification; /home/shuv/.factory/missions/53d67669-5ba8-4745-9fd5-71906b40773d/worker-transcripts.jsonl:24 shows the worker ran a baseline package test, edited `packages/skill-ops/src/live.ts`, and only later updated/added tests; /home/shuv/.factory/missions/53d67669-5ba8-4745-9fd5-71906b40773d/handoffs/2026-03-15T20-11-04-436Z__fix-skill-ops-edge-cases__bcdcdd48-398b-47fb-ba76-a1ccb8946c50.json:16-31 records only npm test/typecheck/lint/full test commands, while :92 marks `followedProcedure` true.

summary: Pass. Compared against the prior discovery, activation, and drift failures, commit `3c47f99` closes the original correctness gaps: discovery errors now surface, wrong-target symlinks are repointed, and missing-ref drift comparisons no longer report misleading zero counts. The new regression tests exercise each repaired path, including garbled `rev-list` output and wrong-target activation state.
